description: The creep behavior in a discontinuity is of a different nature depending on the joint surface (planar or rough) and on the filling material.

property_groups.name: Properties
property_groups.description: Joint properties for the 'power' joint constitutive model. Assign the model with 'block contact jmodel assign power [range ...]', then set these with 'block contact property <keyword> <value> [range jmodel power]'.

note: Power-law (Norton) creep joint model. The creep page documents the rheology rather than a flat property-keyword table; only the universal stiffness terms are listed here — see the source page and 'block contact property' for the full creep parameter set.
usage: block contact jmodel assign power ; block contact property <prop> <value> [range jmodel power]
